name: arp-spoof
command: docker compose exec attacker mag arp-spoof --target-ip 172.20.0.2 --gateway-ip 172.20.0.1 --count 20

note: ARP spoofing completed successfully with --count 20. Sent 40 packets (20 per direction: target + gateway) over 20.98s at ~1.9 pkt/s. Cleanup restored ARP tables for both hosts. /proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward is read-only in the container but did not affect packet sending.
